<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Mutate\Mutators\String; use Pest\Mutate\Mutators\Abstract\AbstractFunctionReplaceMutator; class StrStartsWithToStrEndsWith extends AbstractFunctionReplaceMutator { public const SET = 'String'; public const DESCRIPTION = 'Replaces `str_starts_with` with `str_ends_with`.'; public const DIFF = <<<'DIFF' $a = str_starts_with('Hello World', 'World'); // [tl! remove] $a = str_ends_with('Hello World', 'World'); // [tl! add] DIFF; public static function from(): string { return 'str_starts_with'; } public static function to(): string { return 'str_ends_with'; } }
